returns.notes: Only 'signal' is required from the strategy. 'stop_price' is engine-fillable (2*ATR fallback when absent). 'entry_reference_price' and 'entry_reason' are used for slippage logging and diagnostics; omission is acceptable. 'tp_price' is purely optional.
Return None to skip. Fires AT MOST ONCE per trade. Engine guards: partial_taken == False AND bars_held >= 1 AND unrealized_r >= 1.0001. Sub-dict ignored silently if any guard fails.

Absolute new SL price or None. Engine enforces monotone tightening: longs may only raise SL, shorts may only lower SL. Non-monotone updates silently rejected, counted in stop_mutation_rejected. initial_stop_price used for risk-distance is FROZEN at entry and never mutated.

ctx_additions.unrealized_r: float (close-based, initial-stop denominator, UNCHANGED from v1.5.7). long: (close-entry)/(entry-stop_init); short: (entry-close)/(stop_init-entry)
ctx_additions.unrealized_r_intrabar: float (intrabar-aware, NEW in v1.5.8). long: (bar_high-entry)/(entry-stop_init); short: (entry-bar_low)/(stop_init-entry). None when flat.
ctx_additions.entry_price: float (fill price at bar N+1 open, NEW in v1.5.8). None when flat. Exposed so check_stop_mutation can construct a BE stop price without the strategy needing to cache it.

trade_dict_additions.partial_leg: dict | None — partial close details if partial fired during trade
trade_dict_additions.partial_of_parent: bool — True if this trade had a partial exit leg
trade_dict_additions.stop_mutation_rejected: int — count of rejected non-monotone stop mutations

per_bar_ordering: 1. SL/TP resolution via resolve_exit() (intrabar, highest priority)
invariants: No-hook strategies produce byte-equivalent trade dicts to v1.5.7 (and v1.5.6)
Partial guard triple must hold: partial_taken == False AND bars_held >= 1 AND unrealized_r >= 1.0001
Stop mutation is monotone; initial_stop_price is FROZEN
check_entry return MUST include 'signal' (no silent default)
check_exit return MUST be bool (no truthy coercion)
unrealized_r (close-based) is UNCHANGED — additive only, no existing field modified
